params.escrow: The escrow obligation contract that initiated the lock.

params.data: The same hook data that was passed to onLock.
params.to: The address to return assets to (original creator).

approveEscrow(address).notice: Approves an escrow obligation contract to use this hook for the caller.

deposits(address,address,uint256).notice: Tracks deposits: caller → token → tokenId → held.

isEscrowApproved(address,address).notice: Returns whether `owner` approved `escrow` to use this hook.

onLock(bytes,address,address).notice: Lock assets into escrow on behalf of `from`.

onReturn(bytes,address,(bytes32,bytes32,.notice: Return escrowed assets to the original owner on expiry.

unapproveEscrow(address).notice: Revokes a previously approved escrow obligation contract for the caller.
